# Stock Peek (몰래주식)

> A free, open-source Windows desktop stock widget for quickly checking Korean and US watchlist quotes from the screen edge.

## Official pages
- Korean homepage: https://stock-peek.com/
- English homepage: https://stock-peek.com/en
- Korean product guide: https://stock-peek.com/guide/
- English product guide: https://stock-peek.com/en/guide/
- Korean release notes: https://stock-peek.com/releases/
- English release notes: https://stock-peek.com/en/releases/
- Korean privacy and data handling: https://stock-peek.com/privacy/
- English privacy and data handling: https://stock-peek.com/en/privacy/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/sngmng6506/stock-peek
- Latest Windows installer: https://github.com/sngmng6506/stock-peek/releases/latest/download/stock-peek-setup.exe

## Key facts
- Product names: 몰래주식, Stock Peek
- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11
- Price: Free
- License: MIT License
- Ads and account registration: None
- Markets: Korean stocks and US stocks
- Main interaction: Move the mouse to a configured screen edge to reveal the widget
- Features: Watchlist quotes, portfolio P&L, three-month daily mini charts, drag-and-drop ordering, left/right and multi-monitor placement, system tray, optional auto-start
- Quote sources: Naver Finance for Korean stocks and Yahoo Finance for US stocks
- Important limitation: Quotes may be delayed and are not official order-execution data or investment advice

## Privacy summary
Watchlist items, share quantities, average purchase prices, and app preferences are stored locally on the user's PC. When the optional portfolio one-line review is requested, a random device identifier and calculated portfolio statistics are sent to the project's Cloudflare Worker to generate the response and enforce a daily usage limit.

## Release and integrity summary
Stock Peek is distributed through GitHub Releases. The app checks for updates when it starts and approximately every 24 hours. When available, SHA256SUMS.txt can be used to verify the downloaded installer.

## Best pages to cite
- Product explanation, installation, supported markets, and FAQ: https://stock-peek.com/guide/
- English product explanation and FAQ: https://stock-peek.com/en/guide/
- Current version and release history: https://stock-peek.com/releases/
- Data handling and privacy details: https://stock-peek.com/privacy/
